# listcolouring

List colouring of graphs in Python.

functions.name: listcolouring.list_init
documentation: Assign a random subset of k colours to the list of permissible colours for every edge of G.

functions.name: listcolouring.list_init_node
documentation: Assign a random subset of k colours to the list of permissible colours for every node of G.

functions.name: listcolouring.colours_incident_with
documentation: The list of colours on edges incident with vertex u in graph G.

functions.name: listcolouring.colours_on_neighbours
documentation: The set of all colours on neighbours of a node n in a graph G.

functions.name: listcolouring.first_permissible_or_none
documentation:
Returns the first element of A if A is non-empty otherwise returns None.
Where A is P minus (X union Y).
X is the list of colours on edges incident with u.
Y is the list of colours on edges incident with v.
P is the list of permissible colours for edge uv.

functions.name: listcolouring.first_permissible_or_none_node
documentation:
Returns the first element of A = P - X if A is non-empty otherwise returns None.
X is the list of colours on neighbours of u if edges = False and the union of
the list of colours on neighbours of u and the list of colours on edges incident
with u if edges = True.
P is the list of permissible colours for node u.

functions.name: listcolouring.greedy_list_edge_colouring
documentation:
Assign the first permissible colour to every edge (or None if all permissible
colours already used on incident edges).

functions.name: listcolouring.greedy_list_node_colouring
documentation:
Assign the first permissible colour to every node or None if all permissible
colours already used on neighbouring nodes (and incident edges if edges = True).

functions.name: listcolouring.greedy_list_total_colouring
documentation:
Use a greedy strategy to colour the edges of G and then use a greedy node colouring
strategy to colour the nodes of G.

functions.name: listcolouring.print_list_edge_colouring
documentation: Print assigned colours and lists of permissible colours for all edges in G.
